text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm at the school store when my<n>attention is
caught by an Umamusume<n>standing in front of a
shelf.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Error: unable to complete current<n>operation.
Reanalyzing current<n>situation.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The other day, Rice recommended I<n>try the
special carrot buns from the<n>school store.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
She requested my review of the<n>product, so I
came to purchase the<n>product in order to
complete this task.<n>However...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The commodity in question is<n>completely sold out.
It seems I failed<n>to conduct enough prior
research on<n>this bread.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
When I inquired with a store<n>employee about the
item, I was<n>informed that it is a very popular<n>
product that regularly sells out<n>quickly.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In addition, I was able to verify the<n>date of the
next shipment. The<n>problem now is formulating a
strategy<n>for when the time comes...
choice_data_list: Get in line right before the store opens.
Make a break for it during lunch!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Procuring the item at the time of the<n>store's
opening is indeed most simple<n>and logical.
Analyzing potential.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Comparing my schedule and time of<n>shipment...
Comparison complete. I will<n>be available to wait
in line at that time.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your wise words of advice are much<n>appreciated.
I believe this operation<n>shall prove successful.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Analyzing probability of<n>success
with my current capabilities.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Calculating predicted traffic based on<n>current
information. Creating route.<n>Predicting running
speed from latest<n>records.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Updated calculations complete.<n>Potential success
of operation<n>confirmed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The effects of my most recent speed<n>
enhancements have proved<n>beneficial. Your wise
words of advice<n>are much appreciated.
